headline: Jabil's AI-Led Growth Story Drives a 78% Rally: Time to Invest?
summary: Jabil's AI/ML strengths, diversified end markets and upbeat earnings estimates underscore its growth prospects after a 78% rally over the past year.

headline: Can Flex's Hyperscaler Wins Drive Sustained Revenue Growth?
summary: FLEX lands multiyear hyperscaler and AI infrastructure deals, driving capacity expansion and setting up strong CPI revenue growth through fiscal 2029.
